prompt: Run the StockHive agent system through the orchestrator and repo skills. First obtain a deterministic daily sample of exactly 10 usable Nasdaq-100 tickers through the data-fetcher agent. Then run technical, fundamental, and sentiment analysis through their specialist agents in parallel. Aggregate the structured outputs, run the deterministic decision engine, and publish through the telegram-publisher agent. Keep the existing shell/Python live runner available as fallback infrastructure, but treat the orchestrator plus skills as the primary runtime design.
